action_set_definitions.name: get_system_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the comprehensive current state of the sector, including train telemetry, track occupancy, and active conflicts.

action_set_definitions.name: set_train_dispatch_config
action_set_definitions.description: Configures target speed and scheduling priority for a specific train unit.

action_set_definitions.name: modify_movement_authority
action_set_definitions.description: Defines the physical path and signaling profile for a train. Used to route trains and enable 'Green Wave' (non-restrictive) movement.

allowed_segments.description: List of track segment IDs authorized for travel. Must exclude restricted segments.

request_green_wave.description: If true, the system ensures no restrictive signals/braking occur for the duration of the authority.

state_description.simulation_time: Current system time in HH:MM:SS format
state_description.trains: List of active trains in the sector and their physical status
state_description.conflicts: List of detected scheduling or safety conflicts (e.g., head-on, headway violation)
